timeoutLog: The Emperor stammered in silence. The council sees him as weak and unfit!

choices.response: I was securing the future! We did what was necessary.
choices.logMessage: Emperor asserts harsh authority! Morale rises, but unrest simmers.

choices.response: We must unite in this crisis. Let funds be diverted to the people.
choices.logMessage: Emperor appeases the council. Treasury funds diverted to public aid.

choices.response: Silence! Guards, arrest this fool immediately!
choices.logMessage: A council member is arrested! Limiters disabled! The political house is in an uproar!
